# Banner of Elendil ◆

> [!success] 💍 Attachment · Cost: **3** · Fellowship

*Artifact. Item.*

---

Attach to Aragorn.
While Aragorn is commited to the quest, each other questing character you control gets +1 WP.
While Aragorn is attacking, each other attacking character you control gets +1 ATK.
